claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled native textarea conditionally exposes an owned listbox at a configured trigger and entity query.
semantics.rolePolicy: Textarea, combobox, listbox, option, invalid, required, disabled, and read-only state remain baseline; mention summary is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves among enabled mentions while a query is open.
Inserts the active mention and restores caret focus.
Closes suggestions and preserves native text.

nonColor: Mention tokens, labels, descriptions, and state text accompany color.
responsive: Logical properties, native textarea reflow, and bounded suggestions support narrow and RTL layouts.
consumerResponsibilities: Own server-side mention identity resolution and authorization.
Own async suggestion transport; use onQueryChange context and preserve Abort/cancellation policy outside this field.
Configure unambiguous trigger symbols and map option entity types deliberately.
Localize messages and retest bidirectional mention syntax.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
